raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz nahze Elixus us Da-
masku/ kad Ben-Adads to Sih-
reuu Kehniisch neweffels bija/
tad tappe winnam fluddinahts
un fazzijts: Tas Deewa Wihrs
irr tchurp nahzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas Kehniisch
us Asaëlu: Nemm Dahwanas
tawa Rohkâ/ un eij tam Deewa
Wihran pretti/ un waiza zaur
winnu to KUNGU/ un fakki:
Ktuhfchu es no schahs Neweffe-
libas atpestihts?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta gahje Asaëls winnam
pretti/ un nehine Dahwanas fa-
wa Rohkâ/ prohti wiffadu Lab-
bunu no Damaskus/ weenu Na-
stu/ ko tschetrdesmits Rameeti
neffe/ un tas nahze/ un stahwe-
ja winna Preekschâ/ un fazzija:
Taws Dehls Ben-Adads tas
Kehniisch no Sihrijas irr mann
pee tew fuhttis/ fazzidams:
Ktuhfchu es no schihs Sehrgas
atkat weffels?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Elisus fazzija us to:
Eij/ un fakki winnam: * Gann
tu warretu dshwoht. Bet tas
KUNGS irr man rahdijs/ ka
wiꞥsch teeschain nomirs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "* No schihs Neweffelibas, ja tew zitta ne
ka noteek, ka tad arri notizzis, ne zaur to Ne.
weeffelibu, bet ka Asaëls winnu noflahpejs, irr
wiꞥsch nomiris.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un (tas Deewa Wihrs)
skattijahs stipri/ un raudsijahs/
kamehr wiꞥsch kaunejahs/ un tas
raudaja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Asaëls: Ka-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "vehz raud mans Kungu? Un t
fazzija: Tapehz ka es sinnu/ ka
du taunu tu teeni Israëta Beh-
neem darriti/ tu fadedsinaft wi
nu stipras Pills ar Ugguni/
nokanft winnu jaunus Wihr
ar Sohbinu/ un fatreehti win
jaunus Behrnus/ un fakappo
winnu gruhtas Seewas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Asaëls: Ka
irr taws Kalps tas Suns/
tam bij tahdu leelu Leetu da
riht? un Elisus fazzija: Ta
KUNGS irr man rahdijs/ ka
par Kehniu buhsi pahr tee
Sihrexeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta nogahje wiꞥsch
Elisu/ un nahze pee fatwu Kung
kas us winnu fazzija: Ko i
Elisus us tew fazzijs? un tas
bildeja: Winsch fazzija man/
gann warrus dshwoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ohtrâ Deena neh
Asaëls weenn Apfeggu/ un
mehrze to Uhdeni/ un tspatti
to pahr winna Waiqu/ ka t
nomirre. Un Asaëls tappe p
Kehniu winna Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Peektâ Gaddâ Joran
Akaba Dehla ta Israëta Keh-
na/ kad Josawats par Kehni-
bija pahr Juhdu/ sahze Joran
Josawata Dehls eeksch Juh-
waldiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Winsch bija trihsdefini
un diwi Gaddus wezz/ kad win
par Kehniu tappe/ un wald
astoxus Gaddus Jerusalennê.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un staigaja us teen Ze-
teem to Israëta Kehniu/ ittin
Ata
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
